AdminNewOrder.title: New Order #{{orderId}}
AdminNewOrder.text: New order #{{orderId}} from {{userName}} for {{assetName}}. Please review the request.

MemberOrderApproved.title: Order #{{orderId}} Approved
MemberOrderApproved.text: Your order #{{orderId}} for {{assetName}} is approved! Reason: {{reason}}.

MemberOrderRejected.title: Order #{{orderId}} Rejected
MemberOrderRejected.text: Your order #{{orderId}} for {{assetName}} was rejected. Reason: {{reason}}.

MemberOrderReturned.title: Order #{{orderId}} Returned
MemberOrderReturned.text: Return confirmed order #{{orderId}} for {{assetName}}. Thank you for returning the asset on time!

MemberOrderOverdue.title: Order #{{orderId}} Overdue
MemberOrderOverdue.text: The order #{{orderId}} for {{assetName}} was due on {{dueDate}}. Please return it immediately.
